query: How do CICS screen SEND operations work?

results.name: 1500-SEND-SCREEN, 1500-SEND-SCREEN-EXIT
results.preamble:
File: COCRDLIC.cbl
Program: COCRDLIC - Business logic - List Credit Cards
Paragraph: 1500-SEND-SCREEN, 1500-SEND-SCREEN-EXIT (lines 938-950)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COCRDLI, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT02Y
results.summary: paragraph 1500-SEND-SCREEN, 1500-SEND-SCREEN-EXIT in COCRDLIC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID....
results.content:
1500-SEND-SCREEN.                                                        
           EXEC CICS SEND MAP(LIT-THISMAP)                                      
                          MAPSET(LIT-THISMAPSET)                                
                          FROM(CCRDLIAO)                                        
                          CURSOR                                                
                          ERASE                                                 
                          RESP(WS-RESP-CD)                                      
                          FREEKB                                                
           END-EXEC                                                             
           .                                                                    
       1500-SEND-SCREEN-EXIT.                                                   
           EXIT                                                                 
           .

results.name: SEND-TRNADD-SCREEN
results.preamble:
File: COTRN02C.cbl
Program: COTRN02C - CICS COBOL Program - Add a new Transaction to TRANSACT file
Paragraph: SEND-TRNADD-SCREEN (lines 516-538)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COTRN02, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO
results.summary: paragraph SEND-TRNADD-SCREEN in COTRN02C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COTRN02, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
SEND-TRNADD-SCREEN.

           PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO

           MOVE WS-MESSAGE TO ERRMSGO OF COTRN2AO

           EXEC CICS SEND
                     MAP('COTRN2A')
                     MAPSET('COTRN02')
                     FROM(COTRN2AO)
                     ERASE
                     CURSOR
           END-EXEC.

           EXEC CICS RETURN
                     TRANSID (WS-TRANID)
                     COMMAREA (CARDDEMO-COMMAREA)
      *              LENGTH(LENGTH OF CARDDEMO-COMMAREA)
           END-EXEC.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      RECEIVE-TRNADD-SCREEN
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 3400-SEND-SCREEN
results.preamble:
File: COCRDUPC.cbl
Program: COCRDUPC - Business logic - Accept and process credit card detail request
Paragraph: 3400-SEND-SCREEN (lines 1324-1337)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COCRDUP, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
results.summary: paragraph 3400-SEND-SCREEN in COCRDUPC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID....
results.content:
3400-SEND-SCREEN.                                                        
                                                                                
           MOVE LIT-THISMAPSET         TO CCARD-NEXT-MAPSET                     
           MOVE LIT-THISMAP            TO CCARD-NEXT-MAP                        
                                                                                
           EXEC CICS SEND MAP(CCARD-NEXT-MAP)                                   
                          MAPSET(CCARD-NEXT-MAPSET)                             
                          FROM(CCRDUPAO)                                        
                          CURSOR                                                
                          ERASE                                                 
                          FREEKB                                                
                          RESP(WS-RESP-CD)                                      
           END-EXEC                                                             
           .

results.name: 1400-SEND-SCREEN, 1400-SEND-SCREEN-EXIT
results.preamble:
File: COCRDSLC.cbl
Program: COCRDSLC - Business logic - Accept and process credit card detail request
Paragraph: 1400-SEND-SCREEN, 1400-SEND-SCREEN-EXIT (lines 563-581)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COCRDSL, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
results.summary: paragraph 1400-SEND-SCREEN, 1400-SEND-SCREEN-EXIT in COCRDSLC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID....
results.content:
1400-SEND-SCREEN.                                                        
                                                                                
           MOVE LIT-THISMAPSET         TO CCARD-NEXT-MAPSET                     
           MOVE LIT-THISMAP            TO CCARD-NEXT-MAP                        
           SET  CDEMO-PGM-REENTER TO TRUE                                       
                                                                                
           EXEC CICS SEND MAP(CCARD-NEXT-MAP)                                   
                          MAPSET(CCARD-NEXT-MAPSET)                             
                          FROM(CCRDSLAO)                                        
                          CURSOR                                                
                          ERASE                                                 
                          FREEKB                                                
                          RESP(WS-RESP-CD)                                      
           END-EXEC                                                             
           .                                                                    
       1400-SEND-SCREEN-EXIT.                                                   
           EXIT                                                                 
           .

results.content:
SEND-MENU-SCREEN.

           PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO
           PERFORM BUILD-MENU-OPTIONS

           MOVE WS-MESSAGE TO ERRMSGO OF COMEN1AO

           EXEC CICS SEND
                     MAP('COMEN1A')
                     MAPSET('COMEN01')
                     FROM(COMEN1AO)
                     ERASE
           END-EXEC.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      RECEIVE-MENU-SCREEN
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: SEND-TRNLST-SCREEN
results.preamble:
File: COTRN00C.cbl
Program: COTRN00C - CICS COBOL Program - List Transactions from TRANSACT file
Paragraph: SEND-TRNLST-SCREEN (lines 527-553)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COTRN00, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO
results.summary: paragraph SEND-TRNLST-SCREEN in COTRN00C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COTRN00, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
SEND-TRNLST-SCREEN.

           PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO

           MOVE WS-MESSAGE TO ERRMSGO OF COTRN0AO

           IF SEND-ERASE-YES
               EXEC CICS SEND
                         MAP('COTRN0A')
                         MAPSET('COTRN00')
                         FROM(COTRN0AO)
                         ERASE
                         CURSOR
               END-EXEC
           ELSE
               EXEC CICS SEND
                         MAP('COTRN0A')
                         MAPSET('COTRN00')
                         FROM(COTRN0AO)
      *                  ERASE
                         CURSOR
               END-EXEC
           END-IF.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      RECEIVE-TRNLST-SCREEN
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
results.preamble:
File: COTRN00C.cbl
Program: COTRN00C - CICS COBOL Program - List Transactions from TRANSACT file
Paragraph: RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN (lines 510-526)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COTRN00, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
results.summary: paragraph RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN in COTRN00C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COTRN00, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN.

           IF CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM = LOW-VALUES OR SPACES
               MOVE 'COSGN00C' TO CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM
           END-IF
           MOVE WS-TRANID    TO CDEMO-FROM-TRANID
           MOVE WS-PGMNAME   TO CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM
           MOVE ZEROS        TO CDEMO-PGM-CONTEXT
           EXEC CICS
               XCTL PROGRAM(CDEMO-TO-PROGRAM)
               COMMAREA(CARDDEMO-COMMAREA)
           END-EXEC.


      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      SEND-TRNLST-SCREEN
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
